translations.en: sBudo
a chubby, jovial merchant.
"Good $T!
I bet you've come back to pick up that @orrery you ordered."
translations.zh: 我猜汝是來取訂下的那座@orrery（渾天）儀吧。」

translations.en: "Don't be ridiculous! This is the first time we've ever been in your shop!" says Dupre.
translations.zh: 「胡說！我等乃首次踏入汝店！」杜普雷道。

translations.en: "Oh, I'm sorry. I must have thought you were somebody you aren't.
translations.zh: 「噢，抱歉。我必是把汝錯認為他人。

translations.en: "I'm afraid it still hasn't arrived.
"Do you need to buy some supplies?"
"Which, @torches, @oil, @lockpicks, @gems, @backpacks, @bags, @shovels, or @powder kegs?"
translations.zh: 「@torches（火把）、@oil（油）、@lockpicks（撬鎖）工具、@gems（寶石）、@backpacks（背包）、@bags（袋子）、@shovels（鏟子），還是@powder（火藥）桶？」

translations.en: "Then it must be Thursday--or possibly Tuesday."
"I never seem to sell anything on Tuesdays."
"What can I do you for?"
"Why, it's Budo, I believe. That's what it was last week."
"Some call me 'the @Den', but I don't think that's my name."
translations.zh: 「也有人喚我『@Den（老巢）』，不過我想那不是我之名。」

translations.en: "I think someone told me that was @Nick's name."
"I've never met him, myself."
"I don't know what it is, but I've got one on order."
translations.zh: 「我不知那玩意兒究竟是甚，總之訂了一座。」

translations.en: "Oh, I sell this and that."
"I'm not sure what 'this' and 'that' are, but I @sell a lot of them!"
translations.zh: 「我也說不準『這個』『那個』究竟是甚，但我@sell（賣）可多了！」

translations.en: "People give me @money for them, that is."
"It's not as sweet as @honey, but you can trade one for the other."
translations.zh: 「金幣雖不如@honey（蜜）之甘，卻可互易。」

translations.en: "I like honey."
"To keep the guild safe, each member only knows the names of two others."
translations.zh: 「為保公會周全，每員只識另外二人之名。」

translations.en: "You're safer not knowing more about the guild than you have to, believe me..."
translations.zh: 「相信我，關於公會，知道得越少，越安全……」

translations.en: He glances about quickly, to make sure nobody else is listening.
translations.zh: 他迅速環顧四周，確認無他人偷聽。

translations.en: In a low voice he says, "Congratulations, and welcome to the guild."
translations.zh: 低聲道：「恭喜，歡迎加入公會。」

translations.en: "I can offer you the standard member's discount on all supplies now."
translations.zh: 「自此汝可享一切貨品之會員折扣。」

translations.en: "Just remember, whatever you do, don't tell anyone about our @guild!"
translations.zh: 「謹記：無論如何，莫向任何人提及我等@guild（公會）！」

translations.en: A startling change comes over his features.
Suddenly the good-natured bumbler that stood before you has been transformed into a shrewd, sharp, dangerous looking man.
translations.zh: 方才在汝面前那笨拙好心人，剎那間化為精明銳利、形貌兇險之徒。

translations.en: He leans forward staring straight into your eyes as he asks "Who sent you?"
translations.zh: 他傾身向前，目光直射汝瞳：「誰派汝來？」

translations.en: "Uh-huh. Well... Were you hoping to join?"
"Which, @torches, @oil, @lockpicks, @gems, @backpacks, @bags, @shovels, or @powder @kegs?"
translations.zh: 「@torches（火把）、@oil（油）、@lockpicks（撬鎖）工具、@gems（寶石）、@backpacks（背包）、@bags（袋子）、@shovels（鏟子），還是@powder（火藥）@kegs（桶）？」

translations.en: He winks at you. "The guild is behind you, as long as you keep our secret."
translations.zh: 他朝汝眨眼。「只要守住秘密，公會便是汝的後盾。」

translations.en: "Ta ta for now."
"$Z? It seems to me I knew something about that, but I'm having trouble with my remembering."
translations.zh: 「$Z？我隱約記得這事，惜記性不佳。」

translations.en: He leans even closer, transfixing you with his gaze.
translations.zh: 他傾得更近，目光釘住汝身。

translations.en: "Then just remember this. I don't take kindly to anyone spreading secrets around."
translations.zh: 「那汝謹記此言。我向來不喜任何人四處走漏秘密。」

translations.en: "If you were to tell anyone I'm involved with the guild, well..."
translations.zh: 「若汝告訴任何人我與公會有涉，嗯……」

translations.en: "Let's just say accidents can happen to anyone--even the Avatar."
translations.zh: 「不妨這麼說：任誰皆有可能出意外——縱使聖者亦然。」

translations.en: "Now get out of my shop."
"All right, maybe you've got what it takes. We'll see."
translations.zh: 「好吧，汝或許具備條件。日後便知。」

translations.en: "To be a member of the thieves' guild, you have to get your own belt."
translations.zh: 「欲成盜賊公會之員，須得自己掙來一條腰帶。」

translations.en: "Now we have a limited membership, so there's only so many belts in the world."
translations.zh: 「公會員額有限，故世間腰帶數亦有定數。」

translations.en: "If you want one of them, you have to 'retire' a member of the guild."
translations.zh: 「汝若想得其一，須令一名公會成員『退休』。」

translations.en: "Lucky for you, it just happens there's a member we'd like to see 'retired' soon."
translations.zh: 「汝運氣不錯，正巧我等想令某員早日『退休』。」

translations.en: "Her hideout is deep below Britain, in the sewers. You'd best watch out for the rats down there!"
translations.zh: 「她窩在不列顛城下水道深處。下去小心鼠輩！」

translations.en: "One last thing... It
would be an embarassment for the guild to have bodies turning up inconveniently."
translations.zh: 若屍體出現於不該之處，將令公會難堪。」

translations.en: "So don't get too violent unless you have to."
"I'll talk to you when you get back."
"Which of you?"
$N looks at $Y, "It'll cost you #0 gold for each $0, how many do you want?"
translations.zh: $N 看著 $Y：「每 $0 需 #0 金，汝欲幾何？」

translations.en: "Come now, that's a little much don't you think?"
$N frowns at $Y, "That was a good price."
translations.zh: $N 對 $Y 蹙眉：「那已是好價了。」

translations.en: $N looks at $Y. "You haven't any room in your pack."
"I think you have less gold than you thought."
He hands $Y #2 $0\s.
Torch
Oil
Lockpick
Gem
Backpack
Bag
Shovel
Powder Keg
"There you go."
"That's all you can carry."
"That's all you can afford."

translator_notes: Budo = 海盜窟商店主，盜賊公會聯絡人。雙面角色：表面糊塗商人，私下兇狠公會幹部。對話前後反差是表演關鍵。
